title: Wire i18n into CLI commands and Dashboard views — en + zh-CN first-class
description: 将 8 个 CLI 命令的 meta.description + stdout 输出替换为 t('key') 调用, Dashboard 5 个 views + components 通过 useI18n() 消费翻译. Dashboard 导航标签使用双语形式如 '规则树 Rules Tree'. CLI 添加 zh-CN / en snapshot 测试覆盖. 前置: TASK-005 (shared i18n 基础) 和 TASK-006 (CLI colors, 避免相同文件冲突).

files.change: Import createTranslator, detectNodeLocale from @fabric/shared; create and export t() bound to detected locale
Import t from '../i18n'; replace hardcoded description and log strings with t('cli.init.*') keys
Replace hardcoded strings with t('cli.scan.*') keys
Replace hardcoded strings with t('cli.serve.*') keys

files.target: add all CLI + Dashboard translation keys
files.change: Fill in en locale entries for all 8 CLI commands and 5 Dashboard views based on current hardcoded strings

files.target: add all CLI + Dashboard translation keys
files.change: Fill in zh-CN locale entries — Chinese translations of all CLI/Dashboard strings
I18nProvider component wrapping app; detects browser locale (navigator.language); provides i18n context
Custom hook: useI18n() → { t, locale } from context
Load locale messages, detect browser locale (navigator.language with FAB_LANG override), use createTranslator from @fabric/shared
Import useI18n; replace hardcoded strings with t() calls; nav label = bilingual format
Nav label: '规则树 Rules Tree'; all strings via t()
Nav label: '智能体 Agents'; all strings via t()
Snapshot tests for CLI init/scan/serve output in zh-CN locale (FAB_LANG=zh-CN) and en locale (NO_COLOR=1)

implementation: Create packages/cli/src/i18n.ts: import detectNodeLocale, createTranslator from @fabric/shared; populate and export t = createTranslator(detectNodeLocale(), messages)
Fill packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/en.ts and zh-CN.ts with actual strings from CLI commands (init, scan, serve, + remaining 5 commands) and Dashboard views
Update packages/cli/src/commands/init.ts, scan.ts, serve.ts and remaining 5 command files to use t() — change meta.description and all console.log strings
Create packages/dashboard/src/i18n/runtime.ts: browser locale detection using navigator.language, normalize via @fabric/shared normalizeLocale, createTranslator
Create packages/dashboard/src/i18n/provider.tsx: wrap app root with I18nProvider
Update packages/dashboard/src/app.tsx to wrap with I18nProvider
Update 5 Dashboard views to use useI18n() — bilingual nav labels per spec
Create packages/cli/__tests__/i18n.test.ts: snapshot 8 commands in zh-CN + en + NO_COLOR=1
Run pnpm -r build && pnpm -r test to verify

reference.pattern: React Context i18n provider + Node locale detection
reference.examples: Bilingual nav label format: '规则树 Rules Tree' — zh first, en after space

criteria: packages/cli/src/i18n.ts exists and exports t function
FAB_LANG=zh-CN fab scan produces Chinese output for meta.description and status messages
FAB_LANG=en fab scan produces English output
Dashboard nav label for RulesView contains '规则树 Rules Tree' (bilingual format)
packages/cli/__tests__/i18n.test.ts exists with zh-CN and en snapshots
pnpm --filter @fabric/cli test succeeds with all i18n snapshots passing
convergence.definition_of_done: CLI 8 命令 + Dashboard 5 views 通过 t() 消费翻译, 双 locale snapshot 测试覆盖, FAB_LANG 切换生效

rationale.chosen_approach: shared 包提供基础 i18n 基础设施 (TASK-005), CLI 和 Dashboard 各自消费 — 避免循环依赖
alternatives_considered: CLI 和 Dashboard 各自维护独立 i18n 实现
decision_factors: locked decision: default locale = en, zh-CN 一等公民
shared 包的 createTranslator 可同时服务 CLI (Node) 和 Dashboard (browser)
snapshot 测试是 locale 回归的关键守卫
rationale.tradeoffs: 8 CLI 命令的字符串收集工作量较大; zh-CN 翻译质量取决于初始填充

risks.description: en.ts / zh-CN.ts key 集合在 TASK-005 骨架阶段可能不完整, TASK-008 需要补全
risks.mitigation: TASK-008 开始时先收集所有命令的硬编字符串, 再填充 locales
risks.fallback: 缺失 key 时 createTranslator 返回 key 本身作为 fallback

risks.description: TASK-006 和 TASK-008 都修改 commands/*.ts, 合并时可能冲突
risks.mitigation: TASK-008 depends_on TASK-006, 串行执行避免冲突
risks.fallback: 手动解决冲突, 保留 colors.ts 替换 + t() 包裹

commit.message_template: feat(i18n): wire CLI + Dashboard with en/zh-CN, bilingual nav labels
